---
title: "A. Federal Mandates"
subtitle: "FedRAMP, SCuBA, Executive Orders, NIST — the authorities UIAO maps to"
doc-type: subcategory-landing
pillar: compliance
sub-category: A
status: scaffold
date: 2026-04-24
aspirational: true
---

# A. Federal Mandates {.unnumbered}

Every UIAO control, every policy, every piece of evidence ultimately
traces to a federal mandate. This sub-category documents the mandates
themselves, their scope, their UIAO mapping, and the cadence at which
UIAO re-validates against each.

## Leaves

- **A.1** FedRAMP Moderate
- **A.2** FedRAMP High
- **A.3** CISA SCuBA / BOD 25-01 — [adapter](../../adapter-specs/scuba/scuba.qmd)
- **A.4** Executive Orders (14028, 14110, 13800, successors)
- **A.5** FISMA
- **A.6** NIST 800-53 Rev 5
- **A.7** NIST 800-171 (CUI)
- **A.8** DoD IL4 / IL5 — *future-state*
